title: tepion
intro: Tepion is a type of medicinal plant also known as Tephrosia vogelii or Vogel's tephrosia, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate pain, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of tepion include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Traditionally, tepion is prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its roots, leaves, or flowers.
